allow: PowerShell($node = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($node\) { "node: $\($node.Source\) $\(& node --version\)" } else { "node not in PATH" }; $npm = Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($npm\) { "npm: $\($npm.Source\)" } else { "npm not in PATH" }; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Checking common install paths:"; @\("C:\\Program Files\\nodejs", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs", "$env:APPDATA\\npm"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { "FOUND: $_" } })

PowerShell($node = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $npm = Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($node\) { "node: $\(& node --version\)" } else { "node still not in PATH — restart terminal?" }; if \($npm\) { "npm: $\(& npm --version\)" } else { "npm still not in PATH" })
